experiment_title: Illumina Klebasiella pneumoniae ST147 NDM-1 OXA-48
submitter: Sanita pubblica e malattie infettive, Sapienza University
study_title: Klebsiella pneumoniae ST147 co-harbouring NDM and OXA-48 outbreak in Rome, Italy
study_abstract: An outbreak caused mainly by K. pneumoniae ST147 co-harboring NDM-1 and OXA-48 carbapenemases spread between several wards in a large teaching hospital in Rome, Italy. Other relevant sequence types (ST101 and ST512) co-harboring NDM-5 and KPC-3 carbapenemases was identified at the same time.
